subcodes.first_line: Praise, sanctified beyond all questioning and the recognition of this one and that, befitteth and beseemeth the All-Merciful Lord, Who hath raised the standard of "Verily I am" [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقدس از چند و چون و عرفان این و آن حضرت رحمن را لایق و سزاست که علم اننی
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @love and unity, @consolation and comfort, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
